error_signature: slice function does not work as expected
title: Array slicing function returns incorrect starting index
symptom: The slicing function on the array starts at index 1 instead of index 0, leading to missing the first element.
applies_when: Using the slice function on an array
not_this_if: The array is not sorted before applying the slice function
root_cause: The issue arises because the sort operation is applied after the slice operation, which means the first six elements are taken from the unsorted array, leading to incorrect results.
fix_steps: Use the sort function to sort the array before slicing
Apply the slice function to the sorted array with the correct parameters
agent_instruction: Sort the reviews array before applying the slice function to get the correct elements.
